name: 7-up Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box white or yellow cake mix
1 cup 7-up (pour into cup slowly to retain bubbles but not have a lot of foam on top)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Put all ingredients into mixing bowl and beat two to three minutes at medium speed.
3. Pour batter into greased and floured tube pan.
4. Bake for 45 to 60 minutes, or until cakes are done and barely begin to pull away from sides of pan.
5. Glaze with lemon glaze while warm.
